use_cases: Hero section text reveal with explosive character animation on scroll trigger
Call-to-action button text with dramatic explosion effect for emphasis
Marketing landing page headlines with animated letter-by-letter transitions
Interactive text components for storytelling and content presentation
Visual effects for announcements, launches, or special promotional content
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-based text explosion component that splits text into individual characters and animates them through dramatic explosion effects. Characters randomly scatter with rotation, scaling, and opacity changes triggered by scroll or programmatic state changes. Supports jitter, shrink, and explode animation phases with customizable timing and physics-based motion.
